Use this data source to query ECS floating IPs.

Example Usage

```hcl
data "edgenext_ecs_floating_ips" "example" {
  region              = "tokyo-a"
  floating_ip_address = "148.222.161.86"
  limit               = 10
}

output "floating_ip_total" {
  value = data.edgenext_ecs_floating_ips.example.total
}
```

Argument Reference

* `region` - (Required) Region.
* `eid` - (Optional) Floating IP ID filter.
* `floating_ip_address` - (Optional) Floating IP address filter.
* `limit` - (Optional) Maximum number of results, default `10`.

Attributes Reference

* `id` - Stable query ID generated by provider.
* `total` - Matched floating IP count.
* `floating_ips` - Floating IP list. Common fields include `id`, `floating_ip_address`, `port_id`, `fixed_ip_address`, `status`, and `project_id`.
